user.title: Eufy NVR (local)
user.description: Point this at the go2rtc instance run by the Eufy NVR add-on or bridge. Cameras are discovered automatically from its eufy_* streams — you do not enter channel names. Use 127.0.0.1 if the add-on runs on this Home Assistant host.

data_description.host: IP or hostname of the machine running the bridge/add-on (default 127.0.0.1 for the add-on).
data_description.api_port: go2rtc REST API / web UI port (default 1984), used to auto-discover cameras.
data_description.rtsp_port: Port go2rtc serves RTSP on (default 8554), used to stream each camera.

reconfigure.title: Eufy NVR (local)
reconfigure.description: Update where go2rtc is reachable. Cameras re-discover automatically after saving.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach go2rtc at that host/port. Check that the Eufy NVR add-on or bridge is running and the go2rtc API port is correct.

abort.already_configured: This go2rtc endpoint is already configured.
